response.step_by_step_log: The video features hololive English -Advent- members playing a game. I identified the song title 'What Goes Around' using the #AdventOnTheRun hashtag context from the video and search results. I performed a search query: 'hololive English -Advent- What Goes Around lyrics' to confirm the song details and retrieve the English lyrics. Since the song is in English, original language lyrics and English lyrics are the same. The video is a continuous musical performance with game-play and dialogue, which I split into chronological scenes based on the character currently shown driving or leading the segment.
response.global_summary: A music video and gaming challenge featuring members of hololive English -Advent- performing the song 'What Goes Around' while navigating a virtual go-kart escape course.

scenes.description: Fuwawa Abyssgard driving a go-kart through a virtual city, pursued by zombie-like figures. Song 'What Goes Around' begins.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
That what goes around will come back around
They tried to bury us, but we never stay down
No more playing nice, now it's just an eye for an eye
Two wrongs are making it right
We broke our chains, and now
The world above is gonna come down, so loud
What goes around is coming back 'round and 'round
The world is never living this down, so come and get it
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
That what goes around will come back around
They tried to bury us, but we never stay down
No more playing nice, now it's just an eye for an eye
Two wrongs are making it right
We broke our chains, and now
The world above is gonna come down, so loud
What goes around is coming back 'round and 'round
The world is never living this down, so come and get it

scenes.description: Fuwawa and Mococo interact and discuss scores. Song continues.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
We're coming around
We're taking you down
We're coming around
We're taking you down (Oh, we're coming around)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
We're coming around
We're taking you down
We're coming around
We're taking you down (Oh, we're coming around)

scenes.description: Mococo Abyssgard driving the go-kart, navigating obstacles and zombies.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
We won't run
And we won't stop
We're still not done
Coming out on top (What goes around)
No more silence, no more fear
Now the world will know we're here
We'll make it abundantly clear
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
We won't run
And we won't stop
We're still not done
Coming out on top (What goes around)
No more silence, no more fear
Now the world will know we're here
We'll make it abundantly clear

scenes.description: Shiori Novella takes over driving. Song continues with dialogue interruptions.

scenes.description: The members gather, discuss their total scores, and interact with the character Pokey. Closing dialogue.
